dashboard.title: Security Dashboard
dashboard.immediateAction: Immediate action required! Please review and patch critical vulnerabilities as soon as possible.

scanUpload.title: Upload Nmap Scan

dropzone.inactive: Drag & drop Nmap XML files here, or click to select
dropzone.supports: Supports multiple files up to 10MB each

liveScan.title: Live Nmap Scan
liveScan.description: Enter a target (domain name or IP address) to perform a real-time scan directly from our server.
liveScan.note: Note: Deep scans may take several minutes to complete.
liveScan.errorTarget: Please enter a target (IP or Domain)

instructions.title: Upload Instructions
instructions.item1: Upload Nmap XML scan results for vulnerability analysis
instructions.item2: Files will be automatically parsed and analyzed using AI
instructions.item3: Processing typically takes 30-60 seconds per file
instructions.item4: You can view results in the Dashboard and Vulnerabilities sections

whatIsNmap.title: What is Nmap & How to Generate XML Scans
whatIsNmap.description: Nmap is a powerful network scanning tool used to discover hosts, services, and security vulnerabilities on computer networks.
whatIsNmap.generateCommands: Generate Nmap XML files with these commands:
whatIsNmap.note: Replace <target_ip> with the actual IP address or hostname you want to scan. The -sV flag detects service versions, -sC runs default scripts, and -oX outputs results in XML format.

scanUpload.errorSize: File size must be less than 10MB

vulnerabilities.title: Vulnerabilities

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by service name or description...

vulnerabilities.uploadToView: Upload a scan file to view vulnerabilities

details.title: Vulnerability Details
details.terminalNote: Execute these commands to remediate the vulnerability. Always review commands before execution.

feedback.title: Provide Feedback
feedback.question: How helpful was the AI recommendation for this vulnerability?
feedback.placeholder: Share your thoughts on the recommendation...

delete.title: Confirm Deletion
delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete this vulnerability?

aiAssistant.title: AI Security Assistant
aiAssistant.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your AI security assistant. I can help you understand your vulnerability scan results, provide recommendations, and answer questions about your security posture. What would you like to know?
aiAssistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask me anything about your vulnerabilities...
aiAssistant.startNew: Start a new chat to begin
questions: What are my most critical vulnerabilities?
How can I improve my security posture?
What services should I patch first?
What is my overall risk score?

reports.title: Reports
reports.noScans: No completed scans available. Upload and process a scan first to generate reports.
reports.generateFirst: Generate your first report from a completed scan

dialog.title: Generate New Report
dialog.description: Generate a detailed vulnerability assessment report that combines executive summary and technical analysis with AI-powered insights and remediation recommendations.
dialog.detailedReport: Detailed Report: This comprehensive report will include executive summary, technical vulnerability details, intelligent analysis, business impact assessment, and OS-specific remediation commands powered by advanced LLM technology.

preview.pdfDescription: PDF reports cannot be previewed directly. Click download to view the full report.

delete.title: Confirm Delete
delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete the report "{{title}}"?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. The report file will be permanently deleted from the system.

scanHistory.title: Scan History
scanHistory.uploadFirst: Upload your first Nmap scan to get started

delete.title: Confirm Delete
delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete the scan "{{filename}}"?

search.title: Advanced Search
search.errorNoQuery: Please enter a search query or apply filters
search.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your search query or filters

learning.title: AI Learning System
learning.dialogDescription: Apply feedback learning improvements to all analysis types. This will enhance AI responses based on user feedback patterns.
learning.dialogAlert: This process may take a few moments to complete. The learning system will be updated with the latest feedback insights.

delete.title: Confirm Delete
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this feedback entry? This action cannot be undone.

commandBlock.destructiveAlert: ⚠️ This command makes destructive changes. Please ensure you have backups before executing.
